item.title: Bell Unisex – Erwachsene SUPER 3R MIPS Fahrradhelm mat/Gloss Black/Grey M
item.description: Sie können Bell Unisex – Erwachsene SUPER 3R MIPS Fahrradhelm mat/Gloss Black/Grey M hier: ℹ️: S 52-56 cm, M 55-59 cm, L 58-62 cm 23 helmet vents, 6 chin bar vents, 4 brow ports CPSC Bicycle, CE EN1078 784 Gramm (Super 3R) (size M) 433 Gramm (Super 3) (size M) Overbrow Ventilation; Fusion In-Mold Polycarbonate Shell; Float Fit 🛒 Hier!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
